name: Barry Loudermilk
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $238,832 for Barry Loudermilk in U.S. House, GA-11. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
